{{Quote|To serve the New Order is my highest goal.|Captain Gosden|<ref name="G1" />}}
'''Gosden''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought between the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Gosden served aboard the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] at some point prior to its destruction in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="G1" />

A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Gosden stood at a height of 1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. Gosden's highest goal was serving the Imperial [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. Gosden had knowledge with [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]] and technical proficiency in security. The captain was equipped with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and wore the standard [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]] with a [[Rank insignia plaque/Legends|rank insignia plaque]], a cap, and an [[Officer's disk/Legends|Imperial officer's disc]].<ref name="G1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gosden was created in [[1989]] for the first edition of the [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]'', a supplement written for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The image used to represent Gosden<ref name="G1" /> was later used to represent a different [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Venka]], in the first edition of ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]'', which was another West End Games sourcebook released in the same year.<ref name="GG3 1st">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>
